details: frontdoor listened on 127.0.0.1:18081 with loginConfig claweb-login.json
assistant_frame returned recovery-signal-20260320 after recovery turn
startup shows inline MCP header path still unauthorized while claweb/gateway remained up
Muninn auto recall hit used vault=default with prompt_title=Relevant Memory (Muninn Auto-Recall), prompt_persist=false, and has_summary=true on the recovered turn
temporary failure used rest endpoint http://127.0.0.1:18475/api/activate
muninn_auto_recall_error recorded status=error with vault=default while the gateway continued answering
capture and later recall of the teal validation fact occurred on the allowed claweb surface against vault default
frontdoor transcript includes assistant_frame outputs for remembered teal and nebula-helix-20260319
accepted rerun reviews mark both consolidation features as pass after the follow-up fix commit a8e50a8
the rerun specifically confirms paraphrased related-turn cache reuse, refresh on topic shifts, conflict handling, and approved-surface VAL-CROSS-002 recovery proof

observations.because: Recovered-turn gateway logs show prompt_title=Relevant Memory (Muninn Auto-Recall), prompt_persist=false, and has_summary=true, while scrutiny rerun accepted why-aware concise recall formatting rather than raw payload dumping.
The accepted rerun review for muninn-consolidation-why-and-cache-refresh states that a8e50a8 broadened related-turn matching so paraphrased follow-ups reuse cached recall while topic shifts refresh.

The accepted rerun review for muninn-consolidation-conflict-handling-and-recovery says the original feature implements conflict-aware recall filtering and conflict-note surfacing, with no remaining blocker.

The same accepted rerun review confirms capture-triggered recall-cache invalidation and the validator logs show newly written teal and editor facts being recalled later in the same running claweb environment without restart.

worker-gateway.log records muninn_auto_recall_error against temporary endpoint 127.0.0.1:18475 during disruption, while same-shell frontdoor startup plus frontdoor-val-cross-002.log and gateway-val-cross-002.log show later recovery with assistant reply recovery-signal-20260320 and muninn_auto_recall_hit on vault default.
